notes: Strict-done ablation v1: --require-files verdict.md,summary.md,README.md --require-git-tag. Outcome: 0 DONE_REJECTED events fired during the run — model never even attempted to call done(). Result is identical-shape failure to baseline n1_27b_v{1,2,3}: model_stopped at iter 65, 4 files written (research/notes.md + research/questions.md + tests/results.md + test_pr_1057_changes.py), 0 commits, no verdict.md. Strict-done validation never got to do its job because the failure isn't 'calls done() too early' — it's 'never calls done() at all.'
